name: autoworker-codex
description: Autonomous Codex workflow with durable state, evidence-based execution gates, and long-run resume support.

interface.longDescription: Runs the Autoworker plan -> dispatch -> code/test -> gate loop with durable on-disk state and long-run resume support for Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use $autoworker to finish this feature autonomously with real verification.
Use $deep-plan, then start execution from task_plan.md.
Resume the active subtask with $dispatch and inspect state with python3 scripts/autoworker_state.py --write-state.
